antipatterns.antipattern_name: Functional Decomposition: Using the include relationship

instances.explanation: 'Search Collections Data' (UC_Search) is included by 'Download Collections Data' (UC_Download), has no direct actor association, does not include or extend any other use case, is not extended by any use case, and is not part of any generalisation hierarchy. It represents an internal sub-step of 'Download Collections Data' rather than a standalone service observable to any actor, making it a functional decomposition of 'Download Collections Data' via the include relationship.
